title: Wave 20 - Manager login-first session parity
description: Establish manager login-first bootstrap and backend session introspection parity so manager runtime no longer depends on static env token bootstrap.
acceptance_criteria: Wave plan defines architect, backend, mobile, and qa sequencing with rollback checkpoints
Execution plan keeps Docker-only backend policy and AI executor policy
Execution plan includes PR/Jira traceability and merge gating
